subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. This Wronged One, amidst the tumult of sorrows, calleth them that dwell in the realm of creation unto truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی این مظلوم در بحبوحه احزان من فی الامکانرا بحق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
